name: openapi-atlas-mcp
description: Aggregates multiple OpenAPI specifications into a single searchable MCP server, enabling AI agents to query API endpoints across all services using natural language.

name: Pusher Channels MCP Server
description: An MCP server that enables AI agents to send realtime messages, query channels, and manage users through Pusher Channels.

name: MCP Notes Server
description: A small Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives an AI a personal notes/todo store. Built for learning.

name: codebase-context-mcp
description: Enables codebase indexing and searching with symbolic and full-text search, supporting multiple programming languages, designed to work on any architecture including ARM64.

name: Amazon SP-API MCP
description: A production-grade MCP server for the Amazon Selling Partner API that provides a complete registry of 353 operations across 49 API domains, enabling discovery, description, and invocation of SP-API operations with version awareness and safety controls.

name: stobo-mcp
description: Retired MCP server that originally provided SEO/AEO audits; now only exposes a stobo_status tool indicating the service has been shut down.

name: HWPX MCP Server
description: A Model Context Protocol server for reading, editing, and reproducing the layout of HWPX documents (Korean word processor format) using AI, with 146 tools and lossless CST architecture.

name: AutoMobile
description: An MCP server that enables AI agents to control Android and iOS devices via natural language, using platform tools like adb and simctl.

name: chrome-remote-debugging-mcp
description: Controls a running Chrome/Chromium browser via the Chrome DevTools Protocol, enabling navigation, JavaScript evaluation, tab management, and raw CDP commands through MCP tools.

name: Cloaked MCP Server
description: Enables AI agents to make autonomous payments on Solana with on-chain enforced spending limits, preventing unauthorized fund drainage.

name: VoidMob MCP
description: Provides 28 tools for mobile proxies, non-VoIP SMS verifications, dedicated numbers, and global eSIMs, enabling AI agents to perform phone-related tasks.

name: ROS & LLM Integration Bridge
description: Enables large language models to interact with ROS robots seamlessly, allowing natural language control, real-time sensor monitoring, and autonomous task execution without modifying existing robot code.

name: lgpd-mcp
description: Assists organizations and developers with LGPD compliance by providing tools for legal basis validation, consent management, document templates, and data subject rights. Includes resources on ANPD, glossary, and legal foundations.

name: opencode-mcp
description: Enables asking natural-language questions about any GitHub repository and receiving answers grounded in the actual code, with read-only enforcement and automatic repository fetching.

name: quanta-route-geocoder
description: Provides geocoding, reverse geocoding, location lookup, and DigiPin processing capabilities using the QuantaRoute API, enabling AI assistants to convert addresses to coordinates and retrieve administrative boundaries.

name: Task Manager MCP Server
description: Enables CRUD operations on a SQLite task database with filtering by status and priority.

name: axe MCP Server
description: Enables AI agents to scan web pages for accessibility issues and get AI-powered remediation guidance using Axe DevTools for Web.

name: Brooks Model MCP
description: Provides a unified MCP interface to interact with Codex CLI, Claude Code, and Grok API, allowing seamless switching between AI models in VS Code or Claude Code.

name: twiddle-mcp
description: An MCP server that lets coding agents drive and verify mobile apps on iOS Simulator and Android Emulator, providing blocking wait primitives and semantic UI diffs to replace screenshot polling.

name: ihalent
description: Turns Turkish public-tender result notices into structured records and provides analytics on firm history, discount distributions, and competition metrics via an MCP server.

name: codex-research-mcp
description: A small local MCP adapter that lets Claude Code delegate bounded research work to Codex plan credits without giving the worker ownership of the final report.

name: RepoMind-MCP
description: MCP server for repository mapping, dependency analysis, and architecture diagram generation for JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python projects.

name: Engineering Knowledge Graph MCP Server
description: Provides a stdio MCP bridge for coding agents to query and record engineering knowledge locally, preserving debugging history, failed attempts, and verified solutions.

name: mern_chat_app MCP server
description: Enables interaction with a MERN Chat App API for user authentication, chat management, and messaging.

name: kakao-docs-mcp
description: Search and read Kakao Developers REST API documentation through the MCP protocol.

name: MCP Drift Lab
description: A research harness for measuring whether MCP clients preserve informed consent when tool definitions change after approval.

name: ScanHood MCP Server
description: Enables agents to scan tokens for honeypots, check safe launches, and build launch transactions on Robinhood Chain via the Model Context Protocol.

name: Cuebook MCP Server
description: Provides market intelligence including asset search, market state, cues, events, and paper trading via the Model Context Protocol.

name: SEOSiri API Guard MCP Server
description: A sovereign, universal API validation and multi-industry compliance security MCP server.

name: ShipReceipt MCP Server
description: Provides tools to create, run, and verify deterministic delivery receipts for completion claims, enabling reviewers to check freshness and correctness of evidence.

name: Cork Protocol Model Context Protocol
description: Typed MCP gateway for Cork Protocol operations, enabling secure and deterministic interaction with operation core and signing gate.

name: mcp-nfse-nacional
description: MCP server for querying Brazilian electronic service invoices (NFSe) from the national portal. Allows AI agents to authenticate with digital certificates and search, detail, and download PDFs of issued NFSe.

name: MCP Banco Inter
description: Enables AI assistants to interact with Banco Inter business accounts, including balance inquiries, statement downloads, and full boleto management via natural language.

name: Roblox Studio MCP Bridge
description: Connects AI coding assistants to Roblox Studio, enabling direct manipulation of the DataModel through natural language commands with undo support.

name: deadends.dev
description: Helps AI agents avoid repeating known failures by providing deterministic lookup of dead ends for coding errors and country-specific real-world rules.

name: Xpoz MCP Server
description: Enables AI agents to search Twitter, Instagram, Reddit, and TikTok using natural language queries, with CSV exports up to 500K rows and no API keys needed.
